hook_protocol.notes: Cursor does not expose Claude Code's PreToolUse/PostToolUse plane. The entire hook layer is deferred until Cursor exposes a comparable primitive. APEX's behavioral guarantees that depend on hooks (destructive-guard, prompt-guard, schema-drift, ...) are not available on Cursor in this round.

agent_dispatch.notes: Cursor reads `.cursor/rules/*.md` with a similar frontmatter shape; agent dispatch by frontmatter `name:` carries.
